Top Projects

KitsuDB

Go
C

An in-memory cache database written in Go that implements the Redis RESP protocol, using an event-loop architecture for concurrency.

Go
C

A naive implementation of a Docker-like container in go on linux.

Next.js
TypeScript
PostgreSQL
Docker

Developed a Dockerized financial app with PostgreSQL for secure, fast transaction tracking and interactive spending insights.

Archive

Other interesting things I've built along the way.

Online-Pal

Built a real-time chat app using WebSockets and Redis Pub/Sub for low-latency messaging and scalable performance.

LiveGitHub

Crafter.ai

Built a responsive article publishing platform with Redux-based state management and AI-assisted content suggestions.

LiveGitHub

Mirrorly

Mirrorly is an extension that lets you see yourself in every outfit online. AI-powered virtual try-ons.

GitHub

GOMON

gomon – A minimal Go-powered nodemon alternative. Watches your files, rebuilds, and reruns your app on change.

GitHub

GLSP

glsp is a basic Go-based implementation of the Language Server Protocol.

GitHub
